S0(3), A 17 S, 2007 FR Hewe R | MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 31st March, 2007 S.0. 506(E).—In excrcise of the powers conferred by Sub-section (3) of Section 3 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986), the Central Government herchy makes the following further amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment and Forests, number 8.0. 671(E), dated the 30th September, 1996, namely i-— In the said notification, in paragraph 1, for the words “for a period of ten years and six months”, the words “for a period of eleven years” shall be substituted.
